attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.ATTR_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.DESCRIPTIVE_FLEXFIELD_NAME, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.MULTI_ROW, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.SECURITY_TYPE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.OWNING_PARTY_ID, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.VIEW_PRIVILEGE_ID, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.EDIT_PRIVILEGE_ID, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.AGV_NAME, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.REGION_CODE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.BUSINESS_EVENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.PRE_BUSINESS_EVENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.VARIANT, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.NUM_OF_ROWS, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.NUM_OF_COLS, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT,
(
select ATTR_GROUP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT
minus
select ATTR_GROUP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ATTR_GROUP_ID = STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.ATTR_GROUP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME
